# About us
## As a team
*We* are **Dreaming Studio**, a **studio** full of *people*, who *want* to **create** *silly and funny, but still big* **open-source** projects! Our **studio** is full of *creative, caring and silly people!* *We* **usually** make **LÖVE2D** *games*, **programming languages**, and *they're* **all** in **Lua**!  
  
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Lua-Lovers!-blue?logo=lua)  
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/LÖVE2D-Users!-blue.svg?logo=data:image/png;base64,)
## Staff
Currently, heres our staff!:
 - **TheDreamingCat** - *Wiki writer, Programmer and Artist!* His **GitHub profile** is [**@TheRobloxStudioCat**](https://github.com/TheRobloxStudioCat)
 - **vika_** - *Beta tester!* She *doesn't* have a **GitHub profile**, sadly :(
 - **gg6andpen** - *Beta tester and Artist!* He *doesn't* have a **GitHub profile** also :(
 - **bananys_34** - *Beta tester!* He *doesn't* have a **GitHub profile** ;(
 - **pickle** - *Beta tester!* He *doesn't* have a **GitHub profile**, *why* do **all of us**, expect **TheDreamingCat** have **no** *GitHub* profiles???
 - **zabivnoi_pyps** - *Beta tester and Artist!* He *doesn't* have a **GitHub profile**... D;
## Our morals
*We* as a **team**, *LOVE Open-Source software*, and **want** more *things* to be ***open-source***! So, that's why every **project** of our ***studio*** has *source code availible*!
## More random things
Also, this **README** has been *writen* by [**The Dreaming Cat**](https://github.com/TheRobloxStudioCat), ***hi!!!***
